name: EuroQol 5-Dimension 5-Level
description: A standardized measure of health-related quality of life consisting of 5 dimensions with 5 severity levels each, plus a visual analogue scale (EQ-VAS)
instructions: Under each heading, please tick the ONE box that best describes your health TODAY.

questions.label: MOBILITY
questions.question: Please indicate which statement best describes your mobility today.

options.label: I have no problems in walking about
I have slight problems in walking about
I have moderate problems in walking about
I have severe problems in walking about
I am unable to walk about

questions.label: SELF-CARE
questions.question: Please indicate which statement best describes your ability to wash and dress yourself today.

options.label: I have no problems washing or dressing myself
I have slight problems washing or dressing myself
I have moderate problems washing or dressing myself
I have severe problems washing or dressing myself
I am unable to wash or dress myself

questions.label: USUAL ACTIVITIES
questions.question: Please indicate which statement best describes your ability to do your usual activities today (e.g. work, study, housework, family or leisure activities).

options.label: I have no problems doing my usual activities
I have slight problems doing my usual activities
I have moderate problems doing my usual activities
I have severe problems doing my usual activities
I am unable to do my usual activities

questions.label: PAIN / DISCOMFORT
questions.question: Please indicate which statement best describes your pain or discomfort today.

options.label: I have no pain or discomfort
I have slight pain or discomfort
I have moderate pain or discomfort
I have severe pain or discomfort
I have extreme pain or discomfort

questions.label: ANXIETY / DEPRESSION
questions.question: Please indicate which statement best describes your anxiety or depression today.

options.label: I am not anxious or depressed
I am slightly anxious or depressed
I am moderately anxious or depressed
I am severely anxious or depressed
I am extremely anxious or depressed

questions.label: YOUR HEALTH TODAY
questions.question: We would like to know how good or bad your health is TODAY. This scale is numbered from 0 to 10. 10 means the best health you can imagine. 0 means the worst health you can imagine. Please indicate on this scale how your health is TODAY.
questions.minLabel: The worst health you can imagine
questions.maxLabel: The best health you can imagine

healthStateProfile.description: The 5-digit health state profile is formed by combining the level (1-5) selected for each dimension
healthStateProfile.format: XXXXX where each X is the level (1-5) for each dimension in order: Mobility, Self-Care, Usual Activities, Pain/Discomfort, Anxiety/Depression
healthStateProfile.example: 11111 = perfect health on all dimensions, 55555 = worst state on all dimensions

indexValue.description: Health state profiles can be converted to a single index value using country-specific value sets
indexValue.note: Index values require application of EuroQol value sets which vary by country
indexValue.range: Typically ranges from negative values (states worse than dead) to 1.0 (full health)

riskRules.message: Severe mobility impairment reported - may require mobility aids or assistance
Severe self-care impairment - may require personal care assistance
Severe pain/discomfort reported - pain management review recommended
Severe anxiety/depression reported - mental health assessment recommended
Very low self-rated health (VAS ≤3) - comprehensive health review recommended

interpretation.clinicalNotes: The EQ-5D-5L is a standardized instrument for measuring health-related quality of life. It provides a descriptive profile of health across 5 dimensions and a self-rated health score (EQ-VAS). The 5L version has 5 levels per dimension, providing greater sensitivity than the original 3L version.

dimensions.self_care: Ability to wash and dress oneself
dimensions.usual_activities: Ability to perform work, study, housework, family or leisure activities
dimensions.pain_discomfort: Level of pain or discomfort experienced
dimensions.anxiety_depression: Level of anxiety or depression experienced

profileInterpretation.11111: Full health - no problems in any dimension

clinicalApplications: Measuring health status in clinical practice
limitations: Does not capture all aspects of health (e.g., cognition, social function)
Index values require country-specific value sets
VAS may be influenced by current mood and expectations
5-level version is more sensitive but may increase respondent burden slightly
references: Herdman M, Gudex C, Lloyd A, et al. Development and preliminary testing of the new five-level version of EQ-5D (EQ-5D-5L). Qual Life Res. 2011;20(10):1727-1736.
EuroQol Group. EuroQol - a new facility for the measurement of health-related quality of life. Health Policy. 1990;16(3):199-208.
